before_market: Morning in the market should have been routine, but the hero's battle has already started. Keep your head down and find your way through.
before_bridge: The road home takes you across a damaged bridge. The hero moved on, but the aftermath is still burning.
before_forestchokepoint: The forest path narrows and every shortcut is blocked by destruction. Stay focused and keep moving.
before_burninghearthrun: Home is close enough to see. One final clash between hero and enemy stands in your way.
ending: You finally reach home... just in time to see it destroyed in the hero's final battle. You survived, but you were never the main character.
